---
title: "Gapminder: Life Expectancy and Development"
---

Gapminder is a country-year dataset (1952 to 2007, 5-year intervals) with life expectancy, population, and GDP per capita for 142 countries

## Pages
- [Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita](life-gdp.qmd)
- [Life Expectancy and Population](life-population.qmd)
- [Country Analysis](country.qmd)
